title: oreosolen alaicus
intro: Oreosolen alaicus is a plant species that belongs to the family Valerianaceae, commonly known as the valerian family. It is native to the Himalayan region of India, Nepal, and Bhutan. The plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, where its roots are valued for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities, and are used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Oreosolen alaicus include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders, and it can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder for herbal use.
